name: Eleuthero
safetyNotes: May influence glucose or metabolic markers; monitor with antidiabetic medications and avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless clinician-supervised.
contraindications: acute fever caution in some traditions
interactions: Use caution with stimulants or blood pressure-active agents.

sources.title: Biotechnological production of eleutherosides: current state and perspectives

Selective in vivo molecular and cellular biocompatibility of black peppercorns by piperine-protein intrinsic atomic interaction with elicited oxidative stress and apoptosis in zebrafish eleuthero embryos

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root decoction or extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root decoction or extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
